_meta.author: scorecard-refine-national autopilot
_meta.note: Evidence-finalize NY federal-House batch: NY-07 (open, Velazquez retiring) + NY-12 (open, Nadler retiring) 2026 D primary candidates. Social-media protocol for newcomers (no roll calls). Candidacy currency: NY federal primary is 2026-06-23; Velazquez & Nadler both confirmed retiring/open seats. Micah Bergdale SUSPENDED his campaign May 2026 (off ballot via petition challenge) -> not_running. All five are consistent progressive Democrats; no cross-party deviations found. Score from each candidate's OWN cited statements/endorsements; null where no public position.

set.office: U.S. Representative NY-07 (2026 D Candidate · open seat · Velazquez retiring · primary 2026-06-23)

profile.background: Civil-rights attorney / public defender (Bronx Defenders), 20+ yrs; first-time candidate; son of working-class immigrants.

vichal-kumar.notes_set: Evidence-finalized 2026-06-17 (social-media protocol; no voting record). CANDIDACY: active D primary candidate for open NY-07; Rep. Nydia Velazquez (age 72) confirmed not seeking 2026 reelection; NY federal primary 2026-06-23 (outcome pending as of finalization). POSITIONS from campaign site kumar4ny.com: pro-choice ('Reproductive decisions belong to people, not politicians: full access, full autonomy') -> life q0 FALSE. Immigration: top issue 'Dismantle ICE' - 'ICE must be dismantled... the deportation machine halted,' wants permanent pathways -> deportation q1 FALSE, sanctuary q2 FALSE. Gun-control: campaign lists Moms Demand Action (Everytown affiliate) endorsement -> self_defense q1 FALSE. No public position found on marriage/LGBTQ, family/education specifics, christian liberty, Fed/CBDC/budget, elections, foreign policy, or vaccines/pharma -> null (not inferred from party). No cross-party deviation.

0.note: Campaign issues page: 'Reproductive decisions belong to people, not politicians: full access, full autonomy' - rejects personhood-from-conception.

1.note: Top issue 'Dismantle ICE': 'ICE must be dismantled... the deportation machine halted'; supports permanent pathways - contrary to mandatory deportation.

2.note: Anti-ICE / pro-immigrant; opposes deportation enforcement - contrary to opposing sanctuary policies / federal preemption.

1.note: Campaign site lists Moms Demand Action (Everytown affiliate) endorsement - HARD evidence of support for red-flag laws / restrictions, contrary to this cell.

set.office: U.S. Representative NY-12 (2026 D Candidate · open seat · Nadler retiring · primary 2026-06-23)

profile.background: Software engineer; son of Vietnamese refugees; low-profile underdog in crowded NY-12 D primary; affordability/economic-focused campaign.

chris-diep.notes_set: Evidence-finalized 2026-06-17 (social-media protocol). CANDIDACY: active D primary candidate (FEC H6NY12354, no termination) for open NY-12; Rep. Jerrold Nadler announced 2025-09 he will not seek 2026 reelection; primary 2026-06-23. Low-profile; campaign is near-exclusively economic. POSITIONS from chrisdiep.com + reporting: economic - campaign reported as backing 'preservation of the Federal Reserve's independence' -> economic q1 FALSE (contrary to audit/abolish the Fed). Public safety: own words 'fewer guns, stronger communities' -> self_defense q1 FALSE. Silent on life, marriage, family/education, christian liberty, CBDC/budget, elections, immigration specifics, foreign policy, vaccines -> null (not inferred from party). No cross-party deviation.

1.note: Campaign focus reported to include 'preservation of the Federal Reserve's independence' - contrary to audit/abolition of the Federal Reserve.
Own words: public safety means 'fewer guns, stronger communities, and accessible mental healthcare' - gun-control direction, contrary to opposing restrictions.

set.office: U.S. Representative NY-12 (2026 D Candidate · open seat · Nadler retiring · primary 2026-06-23)

profile.background: Victims'-rights attorney; founder of SurvJustice; helped reauthorize VAWA / expand Title IX; 2018 TED Fellow. First-time candidate.

laura-dunn-ny-12.notes_set: Evidence-finalized 2026-06-17 (social-media protocol). CANDIDACY: active D primary candidate (FEC H6NY12198) for open NY-12; Nadler not seeking 2026 reelection; primary 2026-06-23. Identity confirmed: Laura L. Dunn, SurvJustice founder. POSITIONS: pro-choice + NOW PAC/NOW-NYC endorsement (abortion-rights, 2026-05-15) -> life q0 FALSE. Marriage: campaign site lists 'marriage equality' as a priority; decades of LGBTQ civil-rights advocacy -> marriage q0/q1/q4 FALSE. Immigration: calls ICE 'a fully corrupt organization,' wants human-rights-model reform, cut CBP jurisdiction -> deportation q1 FALSE, sanctuary q2 FALSE. Gun-control: supports 'universal background checks, red flag laws, safe storage' -> self_defense q1 FALSE. No clear position on family/school-choice/CRT, christian liberty (only general 1A free-speech), Fed/CBDC/budget, voter-ID/mail-in, foreign policy, vaccines/pharma -> null. No cross-party deviation.

0.note: Lists 'reproductive access' as a priority; endorsed by NOW PAC/NOW-NYC (abortion-rights) 2026-05-15 - contrary to personhood-from-conception.
Campaign site lists 'marriage equality' as a stated priority - supports same-sex marriage, contrary to man-woman-only definition.

1.note: Explicit 'marriage equality' priority - supports same-sex marriage in law.

4.note: Decades fighting for LGBTQ communities / civil rights; supports advancing LGBTQ policy - contrary to opposing LGBTQ promotion in public policy.

1.note: Calls ICE 'a fully corrupt organization'; wants reform 'based in a human-rights model' - contrary to mandatory deportation.

2.note: Anti-enforcement / pro-immigrant (cut CBP jurisdiction 100->10 mi) - contrary to opposing sanctuary / federal preemption.

1.note: Supports 'universal background checks, red flag laws, safe storage requirements' - contrary to opposing these measures.

set.office: U.S. Representative NY-12 (2026 D candidate – SUSPENDED May 2026, off ballot)

profile.background: Entrepreneur (founded Bytemark transit-ticketing); Jewish; founder of Grand Concourse Indivisible. Suspended NY-12 campaign May 2026 after ballot-petition challenge.

micah-bergdale.notes_set: Evidence-finalized 2026-06-17. CANDIDACY CURRENCY FIX: Bergdale SUSPENDED his NY-12 campaign in May 2026 after the NYC Board of Elections (on a petition challenge backed by rival Micah Lasher) ruled he lacked valid signatures; a Manhattan judge confirmed. He is OFF the 2026-06-23 primary ballot -> candidacy_status: not_running. His campaign website is offline. POSITIONS: public record is almost entirely transit, housing affordability, and democracy/structural reform (e.g., expanding the size of the House); no public statements located on any of the 10 rubric culture-war axes -> all null (not inferred from party). Self-branded 'Freedom Advocate / dash of Libertarian' is rhetorical, not a documented pro-life/pro-gun stance - not scored. No cross-party deviation confirmed.

set.office: U.S. Representative NY-12 (2026 D Candidate · open seat · Nadler retiring · primary 2026-06-23)

profile.background: Public-health leader (MPH Columbia; PhD); former director of USAID's COVID-19 Vaccine Access & Delivery Initiative; UNICEF programs. Self-identified lesbian; sixth-generation New Yorker.

nina-schwalbe.notes_set: Evidence-finalized 2026-06-17 (social-media protocol). CANDIDACY: active D primary candidate for open NY-12; Nadler not seeking 2026 reelection; primary 2026-06-23. Casts herself as the most left-leaning candidate. POSITIONS from ninafornyc.com: pro-choice (federal law to override state abortion bans) -> life q0 FALSE. Pro-LGBTQ (protect gender-affirming care as 'medically necessary'; restore LGBTQ civil rights; self lesbian; secured same-sex recognition at UN) -> marriage q0/q1/q2/q4 FALSE. Elections: For the People Act (automatic voter registration), Ranked Choice Voting Act, overturn Citizens United -> voter-ID q1 FALSE, mass-mail-in q3 FALSE. Immigration: 'Abolish ICE and replace it'; citizenship pathways -> deportation q1 FALSE, sanctuary q2 FALSE. Foreign policy: explicitly wants to 'Legislate U.S. membership in the WHO and ratification of the Pandemic Treaty into federal law,' resume UN dues -> foreign q4 FALSE (pro-WHO/UN). Industry: 'Restore evidence-based vaccine schedules and remove anti-science appointees from CDC/NIH/FDA'; ran USAID vaccine initiative -> industry q0 FALSE (pro-mandate/pro-establishment, contrary to anti-mandate/informed-consent). No public position on school choice/CRT/parental rights, christian liberty, Fed/CBDC/budget/ESG, guns -> null. No cross-party deviation (to the LEFT of party on Israel and Abolish ICE).

0.note: 'Protect reproductive freedom by passing a federal law that overrides state abortion bans and guarantees access to abortion care nationwide' - contrary to personhood-from-conception.
Self-identified lesbian; secured recognition of same-sex couples at the UN; restore LGBTQ civil rights - supports same-sex marriage, contrary to man-woman-only definition.

1.note: Pro-LGBTQ civil-rights agenda - supports same-sex marriage / partnerships.

2.note: 'Protect access to gender-affirming care' as 'medically necessary' - contrary to rejecting transgender ideology / affirming immutable biological sex.

4.note: Restore LGBTQ protections across Title IX, military service, federal workplace law - contrary to opposing LGBTQ promotion in public policy/schools/military.

1.note: Supports For the People Act (automatic voter registration) - contrary to photo voter ID with citizenship verification.

3.note: For the People Act expands vote-by-mail/early voting - contrary to opposing mass mail-in voting.

1.note: 'Abolish ICE and replace it'; American Dream and Promise Act citizenship pathways - contrary to mandatory deportation.

2.note: Expand federal support for migrants/asylum seekers; abolish ICE - contrary to opposing sanctuary / federal preemption.

4.note: Explicitly: 'Legislate U.S. membership in the WHO and ratification of the Pandemic Treaty into federal law'; resume UN dues/arrears - directly contrary to opposing WHO/UN governance overreach.

0.note: 'Restore evidence-based vaccine schedules and remove anti-science appointees from CDC, NIH, FDA'; led USAID's COVID-19 vaccine initiative - contrary to opposing pharmaceutical mandates / informed-consent framing.
